summary: Addressed architecture and security review requests. The Run Scan control now uses explicit isRunning state around the async fetch to prevent duplicate submissions. Radar Task server actions now call an in-action local admin session check before create/update/deactivate mutations. Added action-handler coverage for create, update, deactivate, auth-before-redirect behavior, and updated the task scope plus README authenticated API example.

tests_run.result: PASS: 6 focused Radar Task view-model/action/run-scan tests passed.
PASS: Next.js production build passed with known nonfatal Windows SWC optional-native warnings.
PASS: focused local release smoke passed.
PASS: no whitespace errors; LF-to-CRLF warnings only.

changes_after_request: Replaced React useTransition pending tracking with explicit isRunning state for the mock scan fetch.
Added app/radar-tasks/action-handlers.ts to make create/update/deactivate action boundaries dependency-injectable and testable.
Changed app/radar-tasks/actions.ts to verify the local admin session with cookies(), adminSessionCookieName, and verifyAdminSessionToken() before each mutation.
Added tests for create/update/deactivate payload/mutation shapes and auth-before-deactivation redirect behavior.
Added lib/radar-task-run-scan.ts to the task allowed paths.
Updated README direct API smoke example to show a WebRequestSession login before calling /api/scans/run.
requested_action: Re-review R2 for the resolved duplicate-submit, action authorization, task-scope, and README accuracy findings.
